purpose: Capture student router hidden states and teacher router logits on the shared prompt pack.
Train same-shape additive router delta under the cap-specific relative norm.
Apply only the calibrated router delta to the searched no-gt-0.65 student checkpoint.
Verify the new checkpoint only moves intended tensors and records delta norms.
Run downstream tasks against the router-calibrated ablation candidate.
